new_value: {"notes":"Synchronized hopping options for CCP-12: (1) fnv1a32(eui64^t^epoch) used in current ccp16 and spec/02-physical-link.md:199 + spec/09-packets-timing.md:188; (2) deterministic hop sequence from shared seed; (3) rendezvous via announce with explicit channel in beacon. Human decision required on which to standardize before Rust impl in da2q.12.2 and Zephyr. See spec/drafts for Schnorr too. This is P0 human."}

Defined synchronized hopping in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md with normative pseudocode using standardized hash_32, integrated with CCP-15 select_channel/now(), added ccp16_vectors() to generate.py and updated references. All codereview beads filed+fixed with 3 clean passes (no P0-P2 in final reviews). HUMAN review done via bead.
